title: aspidium reptans var. cordatum
intro: Aspidium reptans var. cordatum, also known as the Mountain Fern or Ostrich Fern, is a type of perennial fern native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and can be used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Aspidium reptans var. cordatum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
